idea-plugin.name: CPH Target Runner
idea-plugin.description: A CLion sidebar helper for competitive-programming samples. Manage sample cases per CMake target, run them quickly, compare outputs, and inspect mismatched lines.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Add Competitive Companion import support with configurable source path templates.
  • Add pure single-file mode that automatically follows the focused .cpp file and selects or creates its CLion C/C++ File run target.
  • Add editor font-size controls with Ctrl+mouse-wheel zooming for CPH input and output editors.
  • Add no-Expected mode for output-only runs with OK/ERR status display.
  • Add compile option and C++ standard settings for generated single-file runs.
  • Add configurable CPH-priority shortcuts for Run All, selected case Run, and selected case Debug.
  • Compact the CPH tool-window settings panel and improve shortcut capture behavior.
  • Support selected-case Debug for CMake Application and C/C++ File targets with CLion-native error reporting.
